No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly provides quality education in Taiwanese language, fostering literacy (Target 4.6) and promoting appreciation of cultural diversity and its contribution to sustainable development through literature and culture (Target 4.7).

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course promotes Taiwanese language and culture, and aims for students to achieve certification, which can indirectly support local cultural tourism and related job creation (Target 8.9).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Promoting the widely used Taiwanese Minnan language and its integration into daily life supports the social and cultural inclusion of its linguistic community (Target 10.2).
evidence: 台灣最廣泛使用的即是台灣閩南語

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course directly contributes to safeguarding intangible cultural heritage by focusing on the Taiwanese language, literature, and culture, including historical and contemporary cultural expressions (Target 11.4).
